# Intake

> Intake is a calorie counter app for iPhone and Android. It is positioned as a no-subscription, no-account, local-first tracker for calories, macros, nutrients, fasting, water, widgets, Apple Watch, Apple Health, Health Connect, and optional iCloud or Google Drive sync.

Important context:
- English and German content are equally important.
- Intake is a one-time purchase app for normal calorie tracking, not a monthly subscription product.
- Intake AI is an optional subscription add-on with richer AI food logging controls. Basic AI logging with your own API key (BYOK) is available without an Intake AI subscription, but provider terms and usage costs still apply.
- Intake has no Intake account system. Data stays on the user's device unless optional platform sync is enabled.
- Intake is best understood as a calm tracking utility, not a coaching, gamification, streak, or meal-plan platform.

## English

- [Intake home](https://www.getintake.de/en): English homepage for Intake.
- [Calorie counter without subscription](https://www.getintake.de/en/calorie-counter-no-subscription): Main English page for no-subscription calorie tracker intent.
- [Calorie tracker without account](https://www.getintake.de/en/calorie-tracker-no-account): English page explaining the no-account and local-first data model.
- [Features](https://www.getintake.de/en/features): English feature overview.
- [Comparisons](https://www.getintake.de/en/comparisons): English comparison hub for subscription-led calorie tracker alternatives.
- [Help and FAQ](https://www.getintake.de/en/help): English FAQ covering pricing, privacy, sync, and app behavior.
- [Intake AI](https://www.getintake.de/en/intake-ai): English page comparing Intake AI with own API key (BYOK) logging.

## Deutsch

- [Intake Startseite](https://www.getintake.de/): Deutsche Startseite für Intake.
- [Kalorienzähler ohne Abo](https://www.getintake.de/kalorienzaehler-ohne-abo): Wichtigste deutsche Seite für Suchanfragen nach einem Kalorienzähler ohne Abo.
- [Kalorien-Tracker ohne Konto](https://www.getintake.de/kalorien-tracker-ohne-konto): Deutsche Seite zum kontofreien und lokalen Datenmodell.
- [Funktionen](https://www.getintake.de/funktionen): Deutsche Funktionsübersicht.
- [Vergleiche](https://www.getintake.de/vergleiche): Deutsche Vergleichsseite für Alternativen zu Abo-Kalorientrackern.
- [Hilfe und FAQ](https://www.getintake.de/hilfe): Deutsche FAQ zu Preis, Datenschutz, Sync und App-Verhalten.
- [Intake AI](https://www.getintake.de/intake-ai): Deutsche Seite zum Vergleich von Intake AI mit Logging per eigenem API-Schlüssel (BYOK).

- [Full LLM context](https://www.getintake.de/llms-full.txt): Longer bilingual product, pricing, privacy, and comparison context.
